Would you like Amadeus to create your Merge Documents?
- 2 Hours per document
- Microsoft word version of the documents will be requested before the scheduled day
- Includes 20 Minute Pre & Post calls to review documents
- Amadeus resource will create the merge document using standard merge fields and merge tables available in the merge tool
- Additional edits or troubleshooting beyond the purchased time will require an additional Master Class order

Would you like Amadeus to load your Menus/Items for you?
- Up to 6 pages per every 4 hours
- Microsoft Word version of the menus will be requested before the scheduled day
- Includes 20 Minute Pre & Post calls to review menus
- Amadeus resource will enter the menus/items within the time purchased
- Additional edits or troubleshooting beyond the purchased time will require an additional Master Class order
